column1: #mapping_set_description: Manually curated SSSOM mappings between FINOS CDM party/address/identifier classes and the NIST OSCAL metadata model (lmodel/oscal).

column9: OSCAL Party covers both organisations and individuals like CDM Party
OSCAL Location bundles address+email+phone like CDM ContactInformation
A business unit may correspond to an OSCAL Location of an organisation
Both bind a Party to a role
Counterparty binds a Party to a buyer/seller role
Role assignment to a natural person
OSCAL PartyExternalId is an externally-scoped identifier
OSCAL Role is the canonical enum target for party roles
